scenes.title: Doors / preflight
scenes.notes: Two outputs visible, bridge/dashboard/panic status checked, no physical effects.

scenes.title: AI welcome
scenes.notes: Host-style announcement explains AI co-pilot and simulated effects.

scenes.title: Band intro + approval
scenes.notes: Pre-approved visual cue; short fog request queues for operator approval only.

scenes.title: Audio-reactive core
scenes.notes: TD handles beat/energy/chroma locally; AI stays at phrase/cue/mood level.

scenes.title: Voice/text mood shift
scenes.notes: Text/transcript request maps to bounded red chaotic mood.

scenes.title: Safety proof
scenes.notes: Excess fog, strobe, mixer and laser requests block; panic/freeze is local.

scenes.title: Closing / audit
scenes.notes: Summarize allowed, queued, approved, blocked and cancelled decisions.
